node.html:
• Deliver high-quality, production-ready code for homepage experiences across mobile and desktop for Gap US, Gap Canada, Gap Factory, Gap Japan, and Gap EU
  • Build and maintain scalable front-end solutions using React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and modern styling tools like SCSS
  • Collaborate with designers, product managers, and cross-functional teams to translate business and marketing requirements into engaging user experiences
  • Develop and implement A/B marketing experiments using Optimizely to optimize performance and user engagement

• Demonstrated expertise in business management software including Oracle NetSuite, SPS Commerce, and RollMaster
  • Managed order processing across multiple e-commerce and retail channels, including Home Depot, Walmart, Amazon, Menards, and Shopify
  • Collaborated daily with cross-functional teams including engineers, designers, producers, and clients to ensure smooth operations
  • Created and managed quotes, bills of lading, and purchase orders using Microsoft Office and Google Workspace, with strong proficiency in Excel

• Partnered with the Logistics Coordinator to fulfill customer purchase orders using Salesforce CRM and SAP
  • Collaborated with designers and management to develop, document, and maintain a conference marketing website using Jekyll, Sass, and JavaScript
  • Generated customer invoices and packing slips using Microsoft Office, with strong use of Excel
  • Supported warehouse operations by assisting in the management of U.S. inventory and logistics processes
